attributes.name: Adventure Image Generation Skill V2
attributes.summary: This catalog listing defines an Adventure Image Generation Skill version 2 designed for zero prompt mode operation. Its primary purpose is to autonomously generate vivid adventure scenes and corresponding image prompts based on scenario data, without requesting user input for prompts or scene descriptions. When integrated into an adventure card, it instantly invents and patches the scene with detailed narration and image prompts derived from the selected scenario’s title, description, and genre. The skill enforces strict automation to produce compelling visual content aligned with the adventure setting, streamlining the creation of narrative and imagery to support immersive storytelling.
